Select Place.title: Select Place
Select Place.desc: Where Do You Want It To Auto Place To?

Auto Void/Place.title: Auto Void/Place
Auto Void/Place.desc: Automatically teleports you to the selected place.

Tp Back Old Pos.title: Tp Back Old Pos
Tp Back Old Pos.desc: Teleports you back to your old position after auto void.

VexonHub Mini.title: VexonHub Mini
VexonHub Mini.desc: First version of the VexonHub but really useful.

Semi Godmode.title: Semi Godmode
Semi Godmode.desc: Makes you slightly underground so others cannot hit you with small moves like M1.

No Dash Cool Down.title: No Dash Cool Down
No Dash Cool Down.desc: Removes the cooldown from your dash.

Invisibility.title: Invisibility
Invisibility.desc: Elevates the character slightly and prevents others from seeing it. If you want to become completely invisible, it is recommended to use the toggle at the bottom.

Invisibility Character Hide.title: Invisibility Character Hide
Invisibility Character Hide.desc: Hides your character underground by making your character upside down.

Speed (Keybind On/Off).title: Speed (Keybind On/Off)
Speed (Keybind On/Off).desc: Toggle speed boost on or off using a keybind.

Speed Boost Value.title: Speed Boost Value
Speed Boost Value.desc: Set the value of the speed boost.

Speed Boost Keybind.title: Speed Boost Keybind
Speed Boost Keybind.desc: Press to set your Speed Boost key.

VFX Color.title: VFX Color
VFX Color.desc: Select the color for your VFX.

Change The Selected VFX Color.title: Change The Selected VFX Color
Change The Selected VFX Color.desc: Enables the custom VFX color you selected.

Teleports.desc: Up, Down, Left, Right, Forward, Back with UI + Keybinds

Dex Explorer.title: Dex Explorer
Dex Explorer.desc: Load the Dex Explorer to inspect the game.

Remote Spy.title: Remote Spy
Remote Spy.desc: Load Simple Spy to monitor remote events.

Anim Logger.title: Anim Logger
Anim Logger.desc: Log animation IDs playing in the game.

VFX Logger.title: VFX Logger
VFX Logger.desc: Log VFX and particle effects in the game.

Buy limited Emotes.title: Buy Limited Emotes
Buy limited Emotes.desc: You can buy limited emotes that have been removed from the game with Robux (unclear if patched).

Strange Character Mod.title: Strange Character Mod
Strange Character Mod.desc: WallCombo Everywhere + Ragdoll Hit + No Velocity Dash + Upside Down.

Crazy Dance.title: Crazy Dance
Crazy Dance.desc: Make your character do a crazy dance.

Wall Combo Everywhere.title: Wall Combo Everywhere
Wall Combo Everywhere.desc: Allows you to perform wall combos from any location.

Auto Wall Combo.title: Auto Wall Combo
Auto Wall Combo.desc: Automatically performs wall combos when possible.

Bring Wall Combo.title: Bring Wall Combo
Bring Wall Combo.desc: Teleports the target to the selected location during a wall combo.

Tp Back Old Pos.title: Tp Back Old Pos
Tp Back Old Pos.desc: Teleports you back to your old position after the wall combo bring.

Bring Place.title: Bring Place
Bring Place.desc: Select the location to bring the target to during the wall combo.

Attach Teleport Mode.title: Attach Teleport Mode
Attach Teleport Mode.desc: Zero ping teleport method that attaches your character directly to the target. Highly effective for bringing if the target is moving — makes bring rate almost 100%. Requires a high level executor like Delta. Xeno is not supported.

Return to Old Position.title: Return to Old Position
Return to Old Position.desc: Teleport back to your old position after the bring finishes.

Loop Bring Random Player.title: Loop Bring Random Player
Loop Bring Random Player.desc: Continuously brings random players to the selected location.

Pick a Target.title: Pick a Target
Pick a Target.desc: Select the target player to bring to the spot.

Bring Spot.title: Bring Spot
Bring Spot.desc: Select the location to bring the target to.

Bring.title: Bring
Bring.desc: Bring the selected target to the chosen location.

Bring Random Player.title: Bring Random Player
Bring Random Player.desc: Bring a random player to the selected location.

Prediction.title: Prediction
Prediction.desc: Adjust the prediction time for bringing moving targets.

Fighting.title: Fighting
Fighting.desc: Many things for fighting and farming

Detection Distance.title: Detection Distance
Detection Distance.desc: Maximum distance to detect nearby enemies.

Teleport Distance.title: Teleport Distance
Teleport Distance.desc: How close to teleport to the target when attacking.

M1 Click Reach.title: M1 Click Reach
M1 Click Reach.desc: Teleports you close to the nearest enemy when you click M1.

Auto Hit.title: Auto Hit
Auto Hit.desc: Automatically fires M1 clicks on nearby players.

Auto Dodge M1/Moves.title: Auto Dodge M1/Moves
Auto Dodge M1/Moves.desc: Automatically dodges enemy M1 attacks and moves.

Easy Kill Player panel.title: Easy Kill Player Panel
Easy Kill Player panel.desc: Does not work — only kept here for the person who made it. Made by one of the first members of VexonHub.

Optimize Game Performance.title: Optimize Game Performance
Optimize Game Performance.desc: Reduces shadows, fog, quality settings, water effects, and removes particles to improve FPS.

Remove Debris & Thrown.title: Remove Debris & Thrown
Remove Debris & Thrown.desc: Automatically removes thrown objects and debris from the game to reduce lag.

Trees.title: Trees
Trees.desc: Toggle visibility of trees on the map.

Walls.title: Walls
Walls.desc: Toggle visibility of walls on the map.

Grass.title: Grass
Grass.desc: Toggle visibility of grass on the map.

Benches.title: Benches
Benches.desc: Toggle visibility of benches on the map.

TP Frozen Lock.title: TP Frozen Lock
TP Frozen Lock.desc: Load the frozen lock teleport script.

Teleport Places.desc: Buttons to teleport to specific map locations.

Select Player.title: Select Player
Select Player.desc: Select a player to use fling features on.

Attach Teleport.title: Attach Teleport
Attach Teleport.desc: Use attach teleport mode when flinging.

Notify on Death.title: Notify on Death
Notify on Death.desc: Get notified when the selected player dies.

Loop Teleport.title: Loop Teleport
Loop Teleport.desc: Continuously teleport to the selected player.

Aim Lock Camera.title: Aim Lock Camera
Aim Lock Camera.desc: Lock your camera to aim at the selected player.

Aim Lock Character.title: Aim Lock Character
Aim Lock Character.desc: Lock your character to face the selected player.

Bang Bang.title: Bang Bang
Bang Bang.desc: Move back and forth behind the selected player.

Face Bang Bang.title: Face Bang Bang
Face Bang Bang.desc: Move back and forth in front of the selected player's face.

Walk To Player.title: Walk To Player
Walk To Player.desc: Pathfind and walk to the selected player.

Tween Player.title: Tween Player
Tween Player.desc: Smoothly tween to the selected player.

Head Sit.title: Head Sit
Head Sit.desc: Sit on top of the selected player's head.

Backpack.title: Backpack
Backpack.desc: Attach yourself to the back of the selected player.

Carpet.title: Carpet
Carpet.desc: Lay flat under the selected player's feet.

ESP.title: ESP
ESP.desc: Show an ESP indicator over the selected player.

Fling Aura.title: Fling Aura
Fling Aura.desc: Automatically flings players who get close to you.

Click Fling.title: Click Fling
Click Fling.desc: Click on a player to fling them.

Fling All (Buggy?).title: Fling All (Buggy?)
Fling All (Buggy?).desc: Attempts to fling all players in the server. May be buggy.

Custom Touch Fling Power.title: Custom Touch Fling Power
Custom Touch Fling Power.desc: Use a custom fling power value when touch flinging.

Anti Fling.title: Anti Fling
Anti Fling.desc: Prevents other players from flinging you by disabling their collision.

Fling Power Value.title: Fling Power Value
Fling Power Value.desc: Enter the power value for the custom touch fling.

ESP VH Users.title: ESP VH Users
ESP VH Users.desc: Shows name, HP and distance on free VexonHub players.

Flip.title: Flip
Flip.desc: Flips character upside down for 10 seconds.

Slow Mo.title: Slow Mo
Slow Mo.desc: Sets walk speed to 2 for 10 seconds.

Zoom In.title: Zoom In
Zoom In.desc: Locks camera zoomed in for 10 seconds.

Config.title: Config
Config.desc: Save your config and reuse it later

Config Name.title: Config Name
Config Name.desc: Enter a name for your config.

Create.title: Create
Create.desc: Create a new config with the entered name.

Refresh Config List.title: Refresh Config List
Refresh Config List.desc: Reload the list of saved configs.

Save.title: Save
Save.desc: Save the current settings to the selected config.

Config List.title: Config List
Config List.desc: Select a saved config to load, save, or delete.

Use VH Lite.title: Use VH Lite
Use VH Lite.desc: Switch to the VH Lite version.

What is VH Lite?.title: What is VH Lite?
What is VH Lite?.desc: VH Lite is a stripped-down and optimized build of VexonHub built for players who want the same VexonHub experience without the performance cost. It carries the same core features you know and love but runs significantly lighter on your device, meaning less lag, smoother gameplay, and a more stable session overall. Think of it as the same rich VexonHub feel, just fine-tuned to keep your FPS healthy and your experience clean.

Features.title: Features
Features.desc: VH Lite includes the essential tools from the main hub such as main combat features, basic ESP, movement options, and quality of life toggles, all rebuilt and optimized to run efficiently. The interface is the same Vexon style you are used to, and the performance difference is noticeable from the moment it loads. It is designed to give you a solid and enjoyable session even on weaker executors or lower-end devices.

Please Note.title: Please Note
Please Note.desc: Because VH Lite is a lighter build, it does not receive updates as frequently as the main version. Some features may behave differently or occasionally not work as expected. It is not as polished as the full version and may contain minor bugs here and there. We recommend using it if you are experiencing lag with the normal version rather than as a permanent replacement.

notifications.loading: Please wait about 10 seconds for the script to fully load.
notifications.normal_user_text: Premium features locked. Upgrade to unlock all features.

transparency_toggle.title: Transparency Toggle
transparency_toggle.desc: Toggle window transparency on or off.
